/this-is-free-xyz.reason: Fully unclaimed: no route, alias, view, or latent/disabled-view claim. Safe to use as a node alias.

/moderated-content.reason: Unclaimed: no route, alias, or latent claim. The moderated_content view lives at /admin/content/moderated, not here, so there is no current or future view collision.

/blog.reason: Already the canonical URL alias of canvas_page entity 2 ("Blog", internal /page/2). A second node here would collide immediately.

/search.reason: Owned by the enabled Views page display search:page (route view.search.page). A node alias here would shadow and hijack the search view.

/admin/content/files.reason: Latent claim: disabled view files:page_1 declares this exact path, and its provider (file module) is already enabled. Re-enabling the File-usage view (routine config toggle) would collide. Also admin-route territory.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: Latent claim: disabled view scheduler_scheduled_media:overview declares this exact path; scheduler and media modules are already enabled. Turning on Scheduler media integration (routine config) would activate the view here and collide.
